label: Love & Relationships
description: Remedies to attract love, strengthen relationships, improve marriage, and resolve disputes

remedies.title: Love & Respect in Joint Family
remedies.purpose: A Woman Getting Love and Respect from Husband & In-Laws
remedies.timing: Once or twice a month on any day till the problem is resolved. In very serious cases, repeat weekly.
ingredients: 1 small piece of brass (available in Pooja shops)
process: Wrap the turmeric, brass and jaggery in the fabric.
Knot or tie it to make a pouch.
The girl who is suffering should go out on the street a little away from her home.
Check a general direction of her home/in-laws home.
Facing away from that direction, throw the pouch behind her shoulder towards the in-laws/married home.
Without looking back to where the pouch has been thrown, go back home.
who: Someone who is separated from her husband
Someone who is living with in-laws and not getting love or respect from them
remedies.benefits: Will ensure that a girl gets love, respect, happiness and safety in her married home.

remedies.title: Turmeric & Mantra to Get Love from Partner
remedies.timing: Thursday — repeat every week till the problem is resolved
ingredients: 1 set of yellow colored clothes (to be worn by the person doing the remedy)
1 food item made of gram flour (besan)
process: Take a bath and wear yellow clothes.
Hold the turmeric in one hand.
In the other hand take the rosary and start chanting the mantra.
Chant 108 times (1 mala).
In the evening eat something made of gram flour or besan along with the evening meal.
Ensure your spouse also eats it.
The turmeric knot can be submerged in water or buried.
remedies.mantra: Om Ratai Kamdevayaha Namaha (ॐ रतै कामदेवायः नमः)

remedies.title: Rock Salt for Marital Disputes
remedies.purpose: Resolve Disputes Between Husband and Wife
ingredients: A lump of rock salt or standing salt (khada namak)
process: Put the rock salt in a glass bowl.
Keep it in any corner of the couple's bedroom.
Don't cover the bowl.
Change the salt monthly.

remedies.title: Coconut, Datura & Camphor Love Tilak
remedies.purpose: Create Love and Affection Between a Couple
process: Put the coconut, datura seeds, and camphor in a grinder and grind into a fine powder.
Put it in a small box.
Mix a little honey in it to form a paste.
Store it in a proper place.
Tell both the partners to use this to apply as a tilak everyday.
notes: This will help resolve issues between a couple.
Can be done even if they are separated or living separately.
Can be done for engaged couples as well.

remedies.title: Nutmeg Love Healing
remedies.purpose: Create Love in a Loveless Relationship
process: Charge the nutmeg with the intention to heal the relationship with 1 particular person.
Keep it in a jar.
Everyday grate and sprinkle a little bit on their food and beverage.
We can charge more than 1 nutmeg if we want to work on relationships with multiple members of our family.

remedies.title: Burning Cloves to Improve Relationships
process: Hold both cloves in 1 hand each.
1 clove represents you and the other the person with whom relations have to be improved.
Call the energy of the person.
Talk to him/her.
Tell them about your problem, anger, challenge, pain, etc.
Then put them on the camphor and burn them.
remedies.who: Can be done for Couples, Partners, Parent–child, Siblings, A person & their in-laws, Business partners

remedies.title: Clove Candle Love Ritual
remedies.purpose: Make Someone Fall in Love with You
process: Place the candle in the holder or cup and light it.
Put the 6 cloves in the flames and let it burn.
Write your name and your beloved's name on the paper.
Roll it and burn it in the same flame.
Let the paper burn completely.
Let the candle also burn out completely.
Repeat this for 3 nights consecutively.
remedies.who: Can be done for Parent–child, Siblings, Couples

remedies.title: Clove in Milk for Romance
process: Put the clove in milk.
Drink it every night.
One can either heat the milk with the clove in it or add it in heated milk.

remedies.title: Gomti Chakra Shivling Offering for Couples
process: Offer 2 gomti chakras and 2 cloves in a temple on shivling.
benefits: When nothing seems to be working out

remedies.title: Cumin Seeds for Faithfulness
remedies.purpose: Keep Your Partner Faithful in Marriage
process: Sprinkle it under your mattress on both your and your partner's side.
Change it once a month.

remedies.title: Camphor & Sindoor Relationship Healing
process: The husband should keep the 2 pieces of camphor under his wife's mattress where her pillow comes.
The wife should keep the pouch of sindoor under her husband's mattress where his pillow comes.
Next morning, throw the sindoor in a deserted place outside the home.
Burn the camphor inside the house.
Do it once every week for 7 weeks.
when: When there are disputes between couples
There is no love between a couple
When both husband and wife are willing to work on their relationship

remedies.title: Coriander Seeds for Peace at Home
process: Keep the coriander seeds in a bowl.
Put the bowl in the east corner of your home.
Once the problem is solved, throw the seeds outside your home.
Wash the bowl and use.

remedies.title: Delay in Marriage Remedy
remedies.purpose: For Delay in Marriage or Early Marriage
remedies.timing: Thursday of Shukla Paksha, preferably by the perspective bride/groom
ingredients: 7 yellow items (flower, thread, brass, besan/gram flour, yellow rai or yellow mustard, turmeric knot, jaggery)
process: Take a bath and wear fresh clothes.
Tie the 7 things in the yellow cloth.
Keep this in your home temple or where you keep your ancestors photo.
Keep it in a place where no one can see it.
This needs to be kept till marriage.
After marriage, immerse this into running water.

remedies.title: Release Blocks for Marriage (42-Day Ritual)
remedies.purpose: Release Obstacles and Blocks Leading to a Delay in Marriage
remedies.timing: 42 days consecutively by the person who desires to get married. Within 1 hour of the sunrise.
ingredients: Bowl or plate to burn it in
process: Rub the turmeric powder with the rice grains to color it yellow.
Keep the yellow rice in the plate or bowl.
Put the camphor on the rice.
Put the cloves on top of the camphor.
Offer it to Goddess Durga and burn it.
Can be done in a home temple or an outside temple.
remedies.note: If a girl is in the middle of her menstruation cycle, then her mother or a married relative can do it for the first 4 days. Post that, she can continue.

remedies.title: Improve In-Law Relationships
remedies.timing: When you go to visit them
ingredients: A small bunch or bouquet of white flowers
process: When going to visit your in-laws, keep the betel nut in your pocket.
Carry the flowers and sweets with you.
When you reach your in-laws home, give them the flowers and sweets as gifts.
The supari should remain with you at all times.
If spending the night, keep it under the pillow while sleeping.
When you come back to your own home, keep this supari in the silver plate and keep the javitri with it.
Keep this in your mandir/altar.
Every time you go to visit your in-laws carry the supari with you.
remedies.who: Any man or woman who does not get well along with one or both their in-laws.
remedies.frequency: For those who visit their in-laws multiple times a month, do it once every month. For those who visit 2-3 times a year, do it every time.

remedies.title: Friendship Charm (Cloves in Red Pouches)
remedies.timing: When to bring friendship, camaraderie, or maintain harmonious relationship
ingredients: 2 small red mojo bags or red taveez
process: Put 7 cloves in each pouch.
Close properly.
Each person carries one to stay friends.
Can wear around the neck.
Replace if thread or pouch breaks.
remedies.who: Can be used for parents-children, siblings, friends, or colleagues.

remedies.title: Legal Matters Support (Nutmeg)
process: Wrap the nutmeg in the purple cloth.
Carry it for all legal discussions, court dates, hearings etc.
To be buried once its purpose is solved.

remedies.title: Purple Rose for Domination
remedies.purpose: Domination in Conflicts and Legal Matters
remedies.timing: When you need to dominate another person in legal cases, court dates, conflicts, or disputed matters
process: Carry this purple rose with you, preferably on your body.
It can be wrapped in a handkerchief.
Can also be kept in the room.
